description: List all available transformation step types with metadata including categories, descriptions, and use case tags. Supports optional filtering by category.

categoryFilter.description: Optional category filter. Valid values: Input, Output, Transform, Utility, Flow, Scripting, Lookup, Join, Validation, Statistics

description.description: Clear description of what this step type does

tags.description: Use case tags for semantic discovery (e.g., ['database', 'sql', 'read'])

output.description: Read data from a database table using SQL queries. Supports all JDBC-compatible databases.
Read data from text files (CSV, TSV, fixed-width). Supports header detection and field mapping.
Read data from a database table using SQL queries. Supports all JDBC-compatible databases.
Read data from text files (CSV, TSV, fixed-width). Supports header detection and field mapping.

errorCases.name: Invalid category filter
errorCases.expectedError: Invalid category. Valid values: Input, Output, Transform, Utility, Flow, Scripting, Lookup, Join, Validation, Statistics
